---
pagetitle: "Workshop 2026"
toc: true
toc-location: right
page-layout: article
---

::: {.page-header}
[Upcoming Event]{.page-header-badge .badge-upcoming}

# 2026 Workshop on AI in Earth and Planetary Science

<br>

Machine learning and AI are evolving fast, and it is difficult to track how geoscience research and application practices are changing with them. Consider joining us, either in person or remotely, for a FREE annual workshop organized by Geological Survey of Finland to explore how AI can improve geoscience workflows, as well as its risks and limitations.

🗓️  June 1-2, 2026  
📍 Venue: Geological Survey of Finland GTK, Auditorium, Vuorimiehentie 5, Espoo, Finland

::: {.actions}
[Register Now](https://forms.cloud.microsoft/e/sRdijQ0z0D){.btn-act .primary target="_blank"}
[View Programme](#programme){.btn-act .secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.section-nav}
[Programme](#programme) [For speakers](#for-speakers) [Venue](#venue)
:::

::: {.content-body}

::: {.callout-box}
Registration and abstract deadline: May 25, 2026. Talk slots are subject to availability.

Only registered participants will receive the link to join the workshop, including possible individual links to hands-on sessions.
:::

## Programme {#programme}

::: {.callout-box}
**Programme update:** The programme is currently under construction and may change.
:::

The schedule is organized as a stable index. Click a linked session title to open its editable page with abstract, bio, materials, images, and tutorial notes.

::: {.schedule-day}
### Day 1 - Monday, June 1 {#day-1}

[Hands-on exercises]{.session-label .session-label-hands-on}

::: {.schedule-table}

| Time | Session | Lead | Format |
|------|---------|------|--------|
| 09:00-09:15 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 09:15-09:30 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 09:30-09:45 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 09:45-10:00 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 10:00-10:15 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 10:15-12:00 | [Getting Started with Geoscientific Machine Learning](2026/workshop-1.qmd) | [Pankaj K Mishra](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pankajkmishra01/), [Sanni Laaksonen](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sanni-laaksonen-4a679419b/), Eetu Hyypio | Hands-on |
| 12:00-13:00 | Lunch | - | Break |
| 13:00-14:00 | [A Free Browser-Based Tool for Systematic Uncertainty Assessment in Unsupervised Seismic ML Workflows](2026/workshop-2.qmd) | [Heather Bedle](https://www.linkedin.com/in/heather-bedle-29b5342/) | Hands-on |
| 14:00-15:00 | [JutulDarcy.jl - High-performance porous media and reservoir simulator based on automatic differentiation](2026/workshop-3.qmd) | [Olav Møyner](https://olavmoyner.com/) | Hands-on |
| 15:00-15:15 | Coffee break | - | Break |
| 15:15-15:45 | [How to use AI to conduct a technical analysis - AI Management of Query](2026/invited-talk-11.qmd) | [Simon Michaux](https://www.linkedin.com/in/simonmichaux/) | In-person |
| 15:45-16:00 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 16:00-16:45 | [Opportunities for quantum computing in Geosciences](2026/invited-talk-10.qmd) | [Mrinal K Sen](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mrinal-sen-7056485/) | Keynote |
| 16:45-17:00 | TBA | TBA | TBA |

:::
:::

::: {.schedule-day}
### Day 2 - Tuesday, June 2 {#day-2}

[Invited talks and discussion]{.session-label .session-label-talk}

::: {.schedule-table}

| Time | Session | Speaker | Format |
|------|---------|---------|--------|
| 09:00-09:15 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 09:15-09:30 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 09:30-09:45 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 09:45-10:15 | [Scientific Machine Learning for Modelling, Inversion and Uncertainty Quantification in Geoscience](2026/scientific-machine-learning-geoscience.qmd) | [Pankaj K Mishra](https://pankajkmishra.github.io/) | In-person · Online |
| 10:15-10:45 | [Novel Applications of Neural Operators in Seismic Exploration and Monitoring](2026/neural-operators-seismic.qmd) | [Umair bin Waheed](https://pure.kfupm.edu.sa/en/persons/umair-waheed/) | Hybrid · Online |
| 10:45-11:00 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 11:00-11:30 | [Surrogate-Based Methods for Efficient Bayesian Posterior Computation](2026/invited-talk-5.qmd) | [Chengkun Li](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chengkun-li-62360612b/) | In-person · Online |
| 11:30-12:00 | [Interpretable Physics-AI Hybrid Modeling for Groundwater Contamination Dynamics and Mitigation](2026/invited-talk-6.qmd) | [Hanli Qiao](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hanli-qiao-128473328/) | In-person · Online |
| 12:00-13:00 | Lunch | - | Break |
| 13:00-13:30 | [Illuminating Subsurface Uncertainty with Seismic Attributes, ML, and Explainable AI](2026/invited-talk-3.qmd) | [Heather Bedle](https://www.linkedin.com/in/heather-bedle-29b5342/) | Hybrid · Online |
| 13:30-14:00 | [Geo or Data Science? The Challenge of ML Buy-In and Preserving Geologic Intuition](2026/invited-talk-4.qmd) | [April Moreno-Ward](https://www.linkedin.com/in/april-moreno-ward-23566a2a/) | Hybrid · Online |
| 14:00-14:30 | [Some Digital Twins and Generative AI in geoscience](2026/invited-talk-7.qmd) | [Fahimeh Farahnakian](https://www.linkedin.com/in/farahnakian/) | In-person · Online |
| 14:30-14:45 | [ML-based workflow to enhance seismic fault interpretation in OBN seismic data](2026/invited-talk-8.qmd) | [Matheus Nilo](https://www.linkedin.com/in/matheus-nilo-68b8a1145/) | Hybrid · Online |
| 14:45-15:00 | Coffee break | - | Break |
| 15:00-15:15 | [Interpretable Machine Learning for Geohazard study](2026/invited-talk-9.qmd) | Iqra Hassan | Online |
| 15:15-15:30 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 15:30-16:00 | [Deep generative learning for geophysical inverse modelling](2026/invited-talk-12.qmd) | [Leonardo Azevedo](https://www.linkedin.com/in/leonardo-azevedo-53522716/) | Online |
| 16:00-16:15 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 16:15-16:30 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 16:30-16:45 | TBA | TBA | TBA |
| 16:45-17:00 | TBA | TBA | TBA |

:::
:::

## For speakers {#for-speakers}

Each linked session title opens a dedicated Quarto page that can be edited independently by the speaker or instructor. Use the assigned page for the abstract, speaker bio, tutorial instructions, images, slides, notebooks, datasets, and any workshop preparation notes.

Keep session pages in `workshops/2026/`, place shared images in `images/`, and use relative links so the pages continue to work when the site is rendered into `docs/`.

## Venue {#venue}

**Location:** Geological Survey of Finland, Auditorium, Vuorimiehentie 5, 02151 Espoo  
**Format:** Hybrid, with in-person and online participation.

:::
